name: ZIFF DAVIS, INC.
business: Ziff Davis is a vertically focused digital media and internet company with brands in technology, shopping, gaming, entertainment, health, wellness, connectivity, cybersecurity, and martech. It sells advertising and performance marketing, subscription and licensing services to consumers and businesses. Its Connectivity segment offers broadband network intelligence to enterprises, and its Cybersecurity & Martech segment provides cloud-based security and marketing tools.

exposures.sentence: Our cybersecurity and marketing technology business provides internet-delivered cloud-based subscription and licensed services to consumers and businesses including cybersecurity, privacy, and digital marketing tools.
Our Gaming & Entertainment platform offers authoritative and engaging content covering video games, movies, anime, television, comics, technology, and more.

Everyday Health Group (EHG) operates a portfolio of properties focused on driving better clinical and health outcomes through decision-making informed by highly relevant information, data, and analytics.

The properties in our shopping platform seek to influence customer purchase decisions through the provision of authoritative content relating to products and services, as well as the presentation of savings and discount opportunities for consumer shopping audiences.

Our Connectivity platform operates under the brand Ookla and includes several data and services businesses that sit at the center of the broadband ecosystem and are sources of information on internet connectivity and network performance, facilitating insights and decision making relating to broadband networks.

Our Cybersecurity & Martech business provides internet-delivered software-as-a-service (SaaS) cloud-based offerings to consumers and businesses of all sizes to meet their communication, messaging, security, privacy, customer marketing, and other needs.
Generative AI and related technologies could present risks and challenges to our business.

catalysts.event: Filed lawsuit against OpenAI for copyright infringement
catalysts.sentence: On April 24, 2025, we filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, Inc. alleging copyright infringement, violations of the Digital Millennium Copyright Act, unjust enrichment and trademark dilution as a result of OpenAI's unlawful and unauthorized copying and use of our content.
